claim_bullets.bullet_text: Rest of array via destructuring yields a copy of elements. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.158-176) possible
Rest of linked list returns same nodes. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.158-176)
Copying prevents parent-child mutations from affecting each other. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.158-176) possible

source_record_text: Copy‑on‑write strategy for arrays and linked lists.
